race.comment: SWEET PRETENDER (6) has narrowly missed here in her last two starts and is desperate to break through. Gets a key jockey switch in Lerena and is drawn cosy. Can strike this time. WOOT WOOT (2) dug deep to get off the mark at a big quote two back at Doomben. Okay last time in town but should find this easier and keeps a 2kg claimer on to get her in well. SHE'S BRUTAL (8) flashed home to just miss last time at Dalby in what has proven a strong form reference. Draws well and gets in nicely with the 2kg claim. Worth good thought. ZEAMAIZE (1) doesn't win out of turn but is knocking on the door. Rises in trip on the quick back-up and is among the main hopes.
